TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kawakawasan_ratoh_malangohahay_to_’edo, title = Kawakawasan_ratoh_malangohahay_to_’edo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kawakawasan_ratoh_malangohahay_to_’edo} }

S.FORM: == Malangohahay to 'edo == kacitawidwidan ano mipawsa han no wawa ko wina ho ira ko cecay a fafahiyan malingad i omaoh nira, ca ka citafo nani loma' nira, "pawsa han to kako ina" han nira ko sowal ci inaan nira, " hayi " sa ko wina nira, "ano mipawsa kiso haw kacitawidwidan to" han to no wawa nira koya wina, o wina sato nira " hayi " sato. Kalahokan to ko cidal, " kering kering kering " sato ko soni noya tawidwidan ni ina, iya sato a ngohah noya wawa o 'edo, o cafay noya wawa a maomah, alalasolasot sato i lalinik no 'atol, tahira to ko wina noy wawa nira, kakahad ko nifariwan nina wawa nira, " cima ko tihi iso a mifariw " han to nira ko sowal toya wawa nira, " cecayay kako " han nira a misamangah ko sowal to wina nira, olah sato to nikakahad a nifariwaw no wawa nira, hinam han ira ko ngohah no wawa nira to 'edo a mipadang mifariw. Hokhok han no wina ma'araw ko 'alomanay 'edo mifaeiw Iya sato wina nira, ca ho kafana' to nikacingohah no wawa nira to 'edo, harateng sato ko wina nira, cima ko tihi no wawa ako,no matira to ko nikakahad ko nifariwan a pala,caay to kapatolas a misaharaterateng kiya wina. Roma sato a romi'ad, mipawsa haca to sakalahok no wawa nira, nikawrira, tona romi'ad caay to ka citawidwidan kiya wina nira, hokhok han to nira wina a mingata, oya sato a ngohah niya wawa nira to 'edo 'aloman, maan ko pinag a misa'osi to ka'aloman, sacaciyaw saan a mifariw, " ci,ci,ci,ci,ci " saan ko caciyaw nangra a mifariw. Matengteng no wina ko wikol no 'edo a moroc " o matiniay sa ca kamo" han to no ina nira koya wawa nira ato ya 'edo", iya sato a 'edo alalasolasot sato i lalinik no 'atol, iya sa wina " o ninian ko ngahah no wawa ako" sato kiya wina noya wawa, opod han nira a mitengteng koya wikol no 'edo, moroc saan. O nini ko saka awa ko fanoh no wikol no 'edo, o matengtengay a mamoroc no ina noya fafahiyan wawa. === Pacefaday Tilid ===
S.PHON: == maɾaŋo~uħaħaj to~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u == kaʦitawiɬ~ɮwiɬ~ɮan ano~u mipawsa ħan no~u wawa ko~u wina ħo~u ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a fafaħijan maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ i o~umao~uħ nira, ʦa ka ʦitafo~u nani ɾo~umaʡ nira, "pawsa ħan to~u kako~u ina" ħan nira ko~u so~uwaɾ ʦi inaan nira, " ħaji " sa ko~u wina nira, "ano~u mipawsa kiso~u ħaw kaʦitawiɬ~ɮwiɬ~ɮan to~u" ħan to~u no~u wawa nira ko~uja wina, o~u wina sato~u nira " ħaji " sato~u. kaɾaħo~ukan to~u ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, " kəriŋ kəriŋ kəriŋ " sato~u ko~u so~uni no~uja tawiɬ~ɮwiɬ~ɮan ni ina, ija sato~u a ŋo~uħaħ no~uja wawa o~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u, o~u ʦafaj no~uja wawa a mao~umaħ, aɾaɾaso~uɾaso~ut sato~u i ɾaɾinik no~u ʡato~uɾ, taħira to~u ko~u wina no~uj wawa nira, kakaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u nifariwan nina wawa nira, " ʦima ko~u tiħi iso~u a mifariw " ħan to~u nira ko~u so~uwaɾ to~uja wawa nira, " ʦəʦajaj kako~u " ħan nira a misamaŋaħ ko~u so~uwaɾ to~u wina nira, o~uɾaħ sato~u to~u nikakaħaɬ~ɮ a nifariwaw no~u wawa nira, ħinam ħan ira ko~u ŋo~uħaħ no~u wawa nira to~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ mifariw. ħo~ukħo~uk ħan no~u wina maʡaraw ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ʡəɬ~ɮo~u mifaəiw ija sato~u wina nira, ʦa ħo~u kafanaʡ to~u nikaʦiŋo~uħaħ no~u wawa nira to~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u, ħaratəŋ sato~u ko~u wina nira, ʦima ko~u tiħi no~u wawa ako~u,no~u matira to~u ko~u nikakaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u nifariwan a paɾa,ʦaaj to~u kapato~uɾas a misaħaratəratəŋ kija wina. ro~uma sato~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mipawsa ħaʦa to~u sakaɾaħo~uk no~u wawa nira, nikawrira, to~una ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦaaj to~u ka ʦitawiɬ~ɮwiɬ~ɮan kija wina nira, ħo~ukħo~uk ħan to~u nira wina a miŋata, o~uja sato~u a ŋo~uħaħ nija wawa nira to~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u ʡaɾo~uman, maan ko~u pina* a misaʡo~usi to~u kaʡaɾo~uman, saʦaʦijaw saan a mifariw, " ʦi,ʦi,ʦi,ʦi,ʦi " saan ko~u ʦaʦijaw naŋra a mifariw. matəŋtəŋ no~u wina ko~u wiko~uɾ no~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u a mo~uro~uʦ " o~u matiniaj sa ʦa kamo~u" ħan to~u no~u ina nira ko~uja wawa nira ato~u ja ʡəɬ~ɮo~u", ija sato~u a ʡəɬ~ɮo~u aɾaɾaso~uɾaso~ut sato~u i ɾaɾinik no~u ʡato~uɾ, ija sa wina " o~u ninian ko~u ŋaħaħ no~u wawa ako~u" sato~u kija wina no~uja wawa, o~upo~uɬ~ɮ ħan nira a mitəŋtəŋ ko~uja wiko~uɾ no~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u, mo~uro~uʦ saan. o~u nini ko~u saka awa ko~u fano~uħ no~u wiko~uɾ no~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u, o~u matəŋtəŋaj a mamo~uro~uʦ no~u ina no~uja fafaħijan wawa. === paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj tiɾiɬ~ɮ ===
S.FORM: == Malangohahay to 'edo == kacitawidwidan ano mipawsa han no wawa ko wina ho ira ko cecay a fafahiyan malingad i omaoh nira, ca ka citafo nani loma' nira, "pawsa han to kako ina" han nira ko sowal ci inaan nira, " hayi " sa ko wina nira, "ano mipawsa kiso haw kacitawidwidan to" han to no wawa nira koya wina, o wina sato nira " hayi " sato. Kalahokan to ko cidal, " kering kering kering " sato ko soni noya tawidwidan ni ina, iya sato a ngohah noya wawa o 'edo, o cafay noya wawa a maomah, alalasolasot sato i lalinik no 'atol, tahira to ko wina noy wawa nira, kakahad ko nifariwan nina wawa nira, " cima ko tihi iso a mifariw " han to nira ko sowal toya wawa nira, " cecayay kako " han nira a misamangah ko sowal to wina nira, olah sato to nikakahad a nifariwaw no wawa nira, hinam han ira ko ngohah no wawa nira to 'edo a mipadang mifariw. Hokhok han no wina ma'araw ko 'alomanay 'edo mifaeiw Iya sato wina nira, ca ho kafana' to nikacingohah no wawa nira to 'edo, harateng sato ko wina nira, cima ko tihi no wawa ako,no matira to ko nikakahad ko nifariwan a pala,caay to kapatolas a misaharaterateng kiya wina. Roma sato a romi'ad, mipawsa haca to sakalahok no wawa nira, nikawrira, tona romi'ad caay to ka citawidwidan kiya wina nira, hokhok han to nira wina a mingata, oya sato a ngohah niya wawa nira to 'edo 'aloman, maan ko pinag a misa'osi to ka'aloman, sacaciyaw saan a mifariw, " ci,ci,ci,ci,ci " saan ko caciyaw nangra a mifariw. Matengteng no wina ko wikol no 'edo a moroc " o matiniay sa ca kamo" han to no ina nira koya wawa nira ato ya 'edo", iya sato a 'edo alalasolasot sato i lalinik no 'atol, iya sa wina " o ninian ko ngahah no wawa ako" sato kiya wina noya wawa, opod han nira a mitengteng koya wikol no 'edo, moroc saan. O nini ko saka awa ko fanoh no wikol no 'edo, o matengtengay a mamoroc no ina noya fafahiyan wawa. === Pacefaday Tilid ===
S.PHON: == maɾaŋo~uħaħaj to~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u == kaʦitawiɬ~ɮwiɬ~ɮan ano~u mipawsa ħan no~u wawa ko~u wina ħo~u ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a fafaħijan maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ i o~umao~uħ nira, ʦa ka ʦitafo~u nani ɾo~umaʡ nira, "pawsa ħan to~u kako~u ina" ħan nira ko~u so~uwaɾ ʦi inaan nira, " ħaji " sa ko~u wina nira, "ano~u mipawsa kiso~u ħaw kaʦitawiɬ~ɮwiɬ~ɮan to~u" ħan to~u no~u wawa nira ko~uja wina, o~u wina sato~u nira " ħaji " sato~u. kaɾaħo~ukan to~u ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, " kəriŋ kəriŋ kəriŋ " sato~u ko~u so~uni no~uja tawiɬ~ɮwiɬ~ɮan ni ina, ija sato~u a ŋo~uħaħ no~uja wawa o~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u, o~u ʦafaj no~uja wawa a mao~umaħ, aɾaɾaso~uɾaso~ut sato~u i ɾaɾinik no~u ʡato~uɾ, taħira to~u ko~u wina no~uj wawa nira, kakaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u nifariwan nina wawa nira, " ʦima ko~u tiħi iso~u a mifariw " ħan to~u nira ko~u so~uwaɾ to~uja wawa nira, " ʦəʦajaj kako~u " ħan nira a misamaŋaħ ko~u so~uwaɾ to~u wina nira, o~uɾaħ sato~u to~u nikakaħaɬ~ɮ a nifariwaw no~u wawa nira, ħinam ħan ira ko~u ŋo~uħaħ no~u wawa nira to~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ mifariw. ħo~ukħo~uk ħan no~u wina maʡaraw ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ʡəɬ~ɮo~u mifaəiw ija sato~u wina nira, ʦa ħo~u kafanaʡ to~u nikaʦiŋo~uħaħ no~u wawa nira to~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u, ħaratəŋ sato~u ko~u wina nira, ʦima ko~u tiħi no~u wawa ako~u,no~u matira to~u ko~u nikakaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u nifariwan a paɾa,ʦaaj to~u kapato~uɾas a misaħaratəratəŋ kija wina. ro~uma sato~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mipawsa ħaʦa to~u sakaɾaħo~uk no~u wawa nira, nikawrira, to~una ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦaaj to~u ka ʦitawiɬ~ɮwiɬ~ɮan kija wina nira, ħo~ukħo~uk ħan to~u nira wina a miŋata, o~uja sato~u a ŋo~uħaħ nija wawa nira to~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u ʡaɾo~uman, maan ko~u pina* a misaʡo~usi to~u kaʡaɾo~uman, saʦaʦijaw saan a mifariw, " ʦi,ʦi,ʦi,ʦi,ʦi " saan ko~u ʦaʦijaw naŋra a mifariw. matəŋtəŋ no~u wina ko~u wiko~uɾ no~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u a mo~uro~uʦ " o~u matiniaj sa ʦa kamo~u" ħan to~u no~u ina nira ko~uja wawa nira ato~u ja ʡəɬ~ɮo~u", ija sato~u a ʡəɬ~ɮo~u aɾaɾaso~uɾaso~ut sato~u i ɾaɾinik no~u ʡato~uɾ, ija sa wina " o~u ninian ko~u ŋaħaħ no~u wawa ako~u" sato~u kija wina no~uja wawa, o~upo~uɬ~ɮ ħan nira a mitəŋtəŋ ko~uja wiko~uɾ no~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u, mo~uro~uʦ saan. o~u nini ko~u saka awa ko~u fano~uħ no~u wiko~uɾ no~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u, o~u matəŋtəŋaj a mamo~uro~uʦ no~u ina no~uja fafaħijan wawa. === paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj tiɾiɬ~ɮ ===
